name: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query ('LDAP Injection')
description: The product constructs LDAP queries using externally-influenced input without properly neutralizing special LDAP characters (parentheses, asterisks, backslashes), allowing attackers to modify query logic to bypass authentication or access unauthorized directory entries.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data that is incorporated into an LDAP query string flowing to EXTERNAL[ldap_server] without a TRANSFORM[ldap_encoding] node that escapes LDAP-significant characters or uses parameterized LDAP query APIs
